Name: insert_department_files
SQL: WITH check_nested_file AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "bucket_id") AS data WHERE true), nested_file AS (INSERT INTO "storage"."files" ("id", "bucket_id") SELECT check_nested_file."id", check_nested_file."bucket_id" FROM check_nested_file RETURNING *), check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $3::uuid AS "id", $4::text AS "description", $5::uuid AS "department_id") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."department_files" ("id", "description", "department_id", "file_id") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."description", check_mutation_result."department_id", nested_file."id" FROM check_mutation_result, nested_file RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_file)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id" FROM mutation_result WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_file) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
